name: Brain CT Trauma Protocol
description: Brain CT for trauma evaluation with emphasis on hemorrhage and fractures

findings.technique: CT of the head without contrast was performed for trauma evaluation.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Parenchymal Hemorrhage
sections.content: No intraparenchymal hemorrhage. No contusions or lacerations identified.

sections.name: Extra-Axial Hemorrhage
sections.content: No epidural or subdural hematoma. No subarachnoid hemorrhage. No extra-axial fluid collections.

sections.name: Fractures
sections.content: No skull fractures identified. No depressed or open fractures.

sections.name: Mass Effect
sections.content: No midline shift. No herniation. Ventricles are normal. No compression of basal cisterns.

impression:
1. No acute intracranial hemorrhage.
2. No skull fracture.
3. Normal trauma CT study.
author: RadReport Templates
